markers.evidence_type: lymphatic marker; lower in LE1 vs LE2
chemokine; higher in LE1; mediates DC migration

other_findings.finding: LE1 cells support function as initial afferent lymphatics based on CCL21, CAVIN2, CCND1 expression
CCL21 mediates DC migration into skin-draining lymph nodes

evidence_quotes.quote: LE1 cells express higher levels of the chemoattractant CCL21, which mediates dendritic cell (DC) migration into skin draining lymph nodes, as well as angiogenesis factors CAVIN2 and CCND1, further supporting their function as initial afferent lymphatics
